---
title: "Review of South Korea at the crossroads - International Affairs"
date: 2019-07
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [Korea, foreign policy, international relations, diplomacy, 2019]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> (2019), "Review of the book [Scott A. Snyder (2018). South Korea at the Crossroads: Autonomy and Alliance in an Era of Rival Powers. Columbia University Press]," <em>International Affairs</em>: 95(4): 961-962, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1093/ia/iiz115"><code>10.1093/ia/iiz115</code></a>
doi: 10.1093/ia/iiz115
#image:
#draft: true
---


## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@article{ayhan_book_2019-1,
	title = {[{Book} {Review} for {Scott} {A}. {Snyder} (2018). {South} {Korea} at the {Crossroads}: {Autonomy} and {Alliance} in an {Era} of {Rival} {Powers}. {Columbia} {University} {Press}]},
	volume = {95},
	number = {4},
	journal = {International Affairs},
	author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
	year = {2019},
	note = {Type: Book review},
	pages = {961--962},
}
```
